meaning: <西>n.(美国墨西哥人的)种族意识
examples: Raza: You have until tomorrow to assemble my missile.
The leader of the Ten Rings is named Raza, after a Marvel Comics character.
The day after the La Raza affair there was another gathering in NY, to which Latinos came out.
The Secretary-General next met Prime Minister Syed Yousaf Raza Gillani at Prime Minister House.
It is a mistake for Obama to skip the National Council of La Raza Conference.
